title: Data Leakage due to Insufficient Access Controls
description: Without knowing the data classification scheme or access control policies, there's a risk that users could inadvertently or maliciously access sensitive data.  This could occur due to overly permissive access rights, lack of data masking, or vulnerabilities in the application's data handling logic.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to sensitive data through misconfigured access controls, vulnerabilities in the application code, or social engineering attacks.
mitigations: Implement a robust data classification scheme and enforce appropriate access controls based on the sensitivity of the data.
Utilize data masking and encryption techniques to protect sensitive data at rest and in transit.
Regularly review and update access control policies.
